## Pull Request Summary
<!-- Provide a brief description of what this PR does and why it is needed. -->

## Related Issue
<!-- Link to the issue this PR resolves, e.g., Resolves #123 -->

## UI Changes (If applicable)
<!-- Attach screenshots or videos showing the UI before and after the change. -->

## Security & Compliance Checklist
<!-- Check all that apply. This is mandatory for security-sensitive changes. -->
- [ ] Added or updated `requireAuth` / `requirePermission` checks
- [ ] Verified Row-Level Security (RLS) policies or Prisma isolation
- [ ] No new sensitive PII or credentials are being logged
- [ ] Included `recordAudit` for write transactions

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated (≥80% coverage)
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] E2E (Playwright) tests pass locally
